decisionSummary.nativePackagingPolicy: Use Capacitor after production auth, storage, privacy forms, review account, and real-device QA are ready. Do not submit a native store build that behaves like a thin web wrapper.
decisionSummary.reason: The project already has mobile web screenshots, PWA assets, public pages, and Capacitor projects. External release is still gated by production auth/CORS, persistent storage, support contacts, privacy forms, review account, signing, and device validation.

officialBasis.name: MDN - Making PWAs installable
officialBasis.localRequirement: Keep manifest, icons, secure production origin, install prompt, offline fallback, and browser-tested mobile UX in the release gate.

officialBasis.name: Capacitor - Development workflow
officialBasis.localRequirement: Build the web app, sync it into native projects, then validate the Android and iOS projects with native toolchains.

officialBasis.name: Apple App Store Review Guidelines - Minimum Functionality
officialBasis.localRequirement: Treat native iOS submission as blocked until the packaged app proves useful app behavior beyond a basic website shell and reviewer access works.

officialBasis.name: Apple App Privacy Details
officialBasis.localRequirement: Complete privacy nutrition answers from the production data flow before App Store submission.

officialBasis.name: Google Play Data safety
officialBasis.localRequirement: Complete Data safety answers for account info, user content, photos/videos, app activity, diagnostics, and deletion behavior.

officialBasis.name: Google Play account deletion requirements
officialBasis.localRequirement: Keep the public account deletion URL working and linked from store metadata when account creation is enabled.

channels.title: Mobile web first release
channels.launchUse: Fastest path for a closed pilot on the public domain.
channels.targetAudience: Founder, internal operators, invited early users, and store reviewers before native packaging.
openGates: Production auth, CORS, and secure cookie smoke test with a review-safe account
Persistent storage verification
Support contact and privacy wording finalization

channels.title: Installable PWA
channels.launchUse: Install-to-home-screen release for Android Chrome and iOS Safari users before store submission.
channels.targetAudience: Pilot users who need a home-screen icon but do not need App Store or Google Play distribution yet.
openGates: Install prompt and iOS add-to-home-screen smoke on production origin
Offline page and update prompt verified after deployment
Authenticated API behavior verified under HTTPS

channels.title: Capacitor Android
channels.launchUse: Google Play or direct Android package after mobile web/PWA behavior is stable.
channels.targetAudience: Android users who need store distribution, managed installs, or native shell behavior.
openGates: Android SDK and JDK 17+ available
Signing key and package ownership confirmed
Google Play Data safety answers finalized
Review account seeded and cloud smoke passed
Real Android device install, file picker, download/open links, safe area, login, and deletion request verified

channels.title: Capacitor iOS
channels.launchUse: App Store package after native behavior and reviewer path are strong enough for App Review.
channels.targetAudience: iPhone/iPad users who need App Store distribution.
openGates: macOS/Xcode archive and signing validation
Apple Developer account and bundle identifier ownership confirmed
Apple privacy details finalized
Review account and reviewer notes completed
Packaged app demonstrates real workflow value beyond a thin website shell
iPhone/iPad safe area, file picker, support/legal links, data export, and deletion request verified

channels.title: Domestic Android store package
channels.launchUse: China Android channel package after operator filings and legal identity are ready.
channels.targetAudience: China Android users reached through domestic app stores or direct enterprise distribution.
openGates: Operator legal entity confirmed
ICP filing and app filing confirmed where required
Channel-specific privacy and permission disclosures finalized
Domestic store screenshots and review material prepared

crossChannelGates.title: Privacy, AI disclosure, and support identity
Review account and seeded demo path
